It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is also known as the "dwarf lady fern" or " Japanese lady fern". This plant is a type of deciduous fern that thrives in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Photinopteris speciosa is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Pteridophyta. As a member of the Marattiaceae family, it is closely related to other species of ferns within this family.
